proposal.working_title: AI Customer Experience: How SMBs Lift NPS With Agentic AI in 2026
proposal.one_line_angle: While Bain pitches AI-CX as a Fortune-500 transformation play, SMBs can deploy three production-ready agentic workflows this quarter to lift NPS without an enterprise roadmap.
outline_bullets: Why AI Customer Experience Outperforms Traditional NPS Playbooks for SMBs in 2026
Three Agentic AI Workflows That Reinvent CX for Lean Teams
Done-for-You vs DIY: How to Deploy AI Customer Experience Without an Enterprise Budget
